creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
I saw many 'indexinfo exited on signal 11' messages in dmesg that were caused by package upgrades:

pid 90666 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 15254 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 15347 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 48021 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 19681 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 27803 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 71035 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 53440 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 1024 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 81133 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 81253 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 60237 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 21268 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 21372 (indexinfo), uid 0: exited on signal 11

After removing some files from /usr/local/info, I could run 'indexinfo /usr/local/info/' without seeing crashes. Here is the list of files I removed:

/usr/local/info/hte.info from editors/hte
/usr/local/info/octave.info from math/octave
/usr/local/info/liboctave.info from math/octave
/usr/local/info/mjpeg-howto.info from multimedia/mjpegtools
